title: New research from @AlliumLabs highlights TRON as a major global rail for USDT across retail, commercial, and cross-border activity.

title: When an AI agent hits a paywall, its autonomy ends.
snippet: Stellar (@StellarOrg): When an AI agent hits a paywall, its autonomy ends. x402 on Stellar fixes that. One HTTP request. One stablecoin payment. No accounts, no API keys, no human in the loop. The internet was built to move information. Now it moves money too. Check it out. https://stellar.org/blog/

title: big tech: we need your data to serve you better

title: DIA Value grew from real market demand from multiple partners.

title: The future of AI isn't one genius model—it's teams of specialized agents working together 🤝 That's why I'm so excited about multi-agent systems!
